overview: A social media platform for sharing photos, discovering content, and connecting with others. Features include posting with captions, liking and saving content, following users, exploring trending posts, and anonymous posting for identity privacy.
features: Photo posting with captions and titles
Explore feed for discovering all public posts
User profiles with bio and profile image
Anonymous posting option for identity privacy
Search by username or caption keywords
Post count, follower, and following stats on profiles
